stimulus.transaction_type: single AXI address command plus optional completion
directed_prefix: secure M2 requests accepted when APROT[1] is zero
secure M2 requests rejected when APROT[1] is one
all thread slots allocated by concurrent unique IDs
stimulus.random_suffix: fixed-seed weighted generation across valid hit, secure deny, and unmapped-address classes

monitors.decoded_command: checks m_axi_avalid, m_select, m_axi_aregion, m_wc_select, and m_wc_decerr for valid hits
monitors.decode_error: checks m_wc_valid, m_rc_valid, m_wc_decerr, and m_rc_decerr for rejected requests
monitors.source_ready: checks that s_axi_aready is held low while output commands are not accepted and pulses only after command outputs drain
